ip_outcome_note: Salza is the captain of Cooler's Armored Squadron and the primary antagonist of Dragon Ball Z: Cooler's Revenge (1991 film). His signature technique is the Salza Blade — a blade-type energy attack. The card name 'Death Razor' is a DBS TCG technique card associated with the Cooler's Armored Squadron faction in BT2. The card's vision describes a small compact alien executing a slashing/razor energy attack in pink-yellow colors — consistent with Salza's energy-blade techniques. Confidence: med (no direct technique-name confirmation via canonical Dragon Ball source, but the card is mechanically associated with the Cooler faction in BT2 and Salza's blade technique is the most prominent razor-type move in that film). Verified.

trivia_bullets.text: Salza is the captain of Cooler's Armored Squadron, the elite strike team serving Cooler (Frieza's older brother) in the non-canon film Dragon Ball Z: Cooler's Revenge (1991). The Squadron consists of Salza, Dore, and Neiz. Salza is described as the strongest of the three. [WebSearch: Salza Dragon Ball Wiki Cooler's Armored Squadron Cooler's Revenge]
sources: WebSearch: Salza Dragon Ball Wiki Fandom
Wikipedia: Dragon Ball Z: Cooler's Revenge

trivia_bullets.text: Salza's signature technique is the Salza Blade — an energy blade projected from his hand, called Salza Blade Rush in the Budokai Tenkaichi and Raging Blast game series. The card 'Death Razor' uses a razor/slash naming convention consistent with Salza's blade-type energy attacks. The DBS TCG often creates technique card names not verbatim from the anime when adapting film-exclusive characters. [WebSearch: Salza technique Salza Blade Cooler's Revenge Dragon Ball Wiki]
sources: WebSearch: Salza Dragon Ball Wiki Fandom

trivia_bullets.text: As a Common-rarity Extra card (BT2-121) in Union Force, Death Razor has the effect 'Activate Main: Choose 1 of your opponent's Battle Cards in Rest Mode and KO it' for 2 Yellow energy. The KO-in-rest-mode effect mirrors the ambush/assassination style of Cooler's Armored Squadron, who attacked the Z Fighters on Earth via surprise. [DBZ Exchange: BT2-121]
